name: dru-business-os
description: DRU Business OS — Plataforma SaaS de gestão empresarial para PMEs angolanas
author: Osvaldo Miranda <osvaldo@dru.ao>

scripts.deploy:infra: cd infra && npx serverless deploy --stage prod
scripts.deploy:infra:dev: cd infra && npx serverless deploy --stage dev
scripts.deploy:auth: cd services/auth && npx serverless deploy --stage prod
scripts.deploy:auth:dev: cd services/auth && npx serverless deploy --stage dev
scripts.deploy:financeiro: cd services/financeiro && npx serverless deploy --stage prod
scripts.deploy:financeiro:dev: cd services/financeiro && npx serverless deploy --stage dev
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:infra && npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:financeiro
scripts.deploy:all:dev: npm run deploy:infra:dev && npm run deploy:auth:dev && npm run deploy:financeiro:dev
